notif.heading: Your Civic Updates
notif.empty: No updates yet. Issues you report will appear here once they're resolved.
notif.toast: An issue you reported was fixed!
hero.tagline: Report once. Verify together. Resolve transparently.
hero.supporting: Turn local civic issues into AI-ready action: report, validate, prioritize, route, track, and verify closure with your community.
problem.title: Civic reports should not disappear into a void.
problem.fragmented.title: Fragmented reporting
problem.fragmented.body: Issues scatter across WhatsApp groups, phone calls, and forms — nobody owns the full picture.
problem.duplicate.title: Duplicate noisy complaints
problem.duplicate.body: The same pothole gets reported ten times, drowning out the issues no one has flagged yet.
problem.proof.title: No proof of real closure
problem.proof.body: “Marked resolved” means little without before/after evidence the neighbourhood can verify.
flow.title: From complaint to civic resolution
evidence.title: A civic evidence packet, not just a complaint.
evidence.body: Gemini reads the photo, description and location, then issues a municipal docket slip: severity, public risk, the right resolver, what’s missing, and the recommended next action — ready for routing in seconds.
community.title: Verified by neighbours, not just uploaded by one person.
community.slip.label: Witness slip
karma.title: Reward verified civic impact, not complaint volume.
impact.title: Your ward’s civic health at a glance.
final.title: Built for Indian streets. Powered by community action.
final.body: From civic issue to civic action — your neighbourhood deserves a visible fix.
footer.tagline: Hyperlocal Problem Solver · Powered by Gemini
report.title: Submit New Civic Report
report.subtitle: Powered by Gemini Multimodal Structured Analysis
report.photo.label: Step 1: Evidence Photo Upload (Required)
report.photo.drop: Drag & Drop or Click to Select File
report.category.label: Category (Initial Guess)
report.landmark.label: Neighbourhood / Landmark
report.desc.label: Specific Civic Description
report.desc.placeholder: Describe how long the issue has existed or the risk to the public. Tap the mic to dictate.
report.loading.title: AI Intake Engine Running
report.loading.hint: Gemini is parsing the image to categorize, assess risk, assign severity, and route your ticket.
app.empty: No report selected. Choose one below or submit a new case.
app.noMatch: No reports match the filter criteria.
missions.title: BBMP Ward 89 — Civic Mission Guild
missions.subtitle: Explore regional missions. Complete validations or resolve targets to earn exclusive badges and multiplier karma points.
missions.monsoon.title: Monsoon Preparedness Guild
missions.monsoon.body: Report and confirm waterlogged streets, damaged drain grates, or dangerous roadside electrical poles around Yelahanka.
missions.clean.title: Clean Commercial Corridor
missions.clean.body: Report and verify commercial waste dumping blackspots near main avenues and promote compliance with waste segregation.
missions.night.title: Night Light Auditing
missions.night.body: Completed. Walk dark corridors, identify dead luminaires, and confirm newly installed LED street lamps.
predict.title: Predictive Insights
map.title: Interactive Bangalore Ward Operations Map
map.subtitle: Glowing pins scale and pulsate based on real-time severity and community verification index.
map.hint: Pins are plotted dynamically from verified citizen GPS tags. Click any pin to load active evidence.
case.uploadHint: Select a proof scenario below to test AI comparisons:
case.mockNote: Routed via NammaFix mock resolver directory — a resolver-ready routing note, not a live government dispatch.
case.auditPrompt: Active Citizen Audit: Do you see this problem too?
case.commentPlaceholder: Add a neighbour comment (e.g., still present this morning, street flooding…)
case.verifySuccess: Neighbour verification submitted! Ward priority points scaled up.
case.noValidations: No neighbour validations submitted. Be the first to audit this spot.
case.copilotHint: Run the Gemini dispatch model to assist admin routing notes.
